violations.text: Raw animal foods such as raw shelled eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as limes and avocadoes in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the exterior of reach-in coolers have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025

The walls behind the 3 bay sink and handwashing sink in kitchen has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025

Food contact surfaces of the meat grinderwere observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Meat grinder cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2024
Basement floor observed with an accumulation of soil residue and dust. Physical facilities to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024
